from fastapi import APIRouter

router = APIRouter()

# Violation: inconsistent response envelopes. One endpoint returns a dict, the other returns a raw list.
@router.get("/users")
def get_users():
    return {"data": [{"id": 1}], "meta": {"count": 1}}

@router.get("/products")
def get_products():
    return [{"id": 99}]
